dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5898 IH: Lejeune Untaxed Compensation and Settlements Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Van Drew introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code to exclude certain damages from gross income.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Lejeune Untaxed Compensation and Settlements Act of 2025.

section.header: Camp Lejeune Justice Act damages excluded from gross income

subsection.text: Section 104(a) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph 5, by striking and at the end,
by redesignating paragraph (6) as paragraph (7), and
by inserting after paragraph (5) the following new paragraph:
the amount of any damages received in an action brought pursuant to the Camp Lejeune Justice Act of 2022; and

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to damages received after the date of enactment of this Act.
